arkhe
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Object Summaries

Source: R/AllGenerics.R, R/summary.R
summary.Rd

Produces result summaries.

# S4 method for AbundanceMatrix
summary(object, ...)

Arguments

object

An AbundanceMatrix object.

...

Currently not used.

Value

An AbundanceSummary object.

See also

Other mutators: mutators, subset()

Author

N. Frerebeau

Examples

## Create a data.frame
X <- matrix(data = sample(0:10, 50, TRUE), nrow = 10, ncol = 5)
Y <- as.data.frame(X)

## Coerce to a count matrix
Z <- as_count(Y)

## Set/get groups
set_samples(Z) <- rep(c("a", "b", "c", "d", "e"), each = 2)
get_samples(Z)
#>  [1] "a" "a" "b" "b" "c" "c" "d" "d" "e" "e"

## Set/get groups
set_groups(Z) <- rep(c("A", "B"), each = 5)
get_groups(Z)
#>  [1] "A" "A" "A" "A" "A" "B" "B" "B" "B" "B"

## Get/get TPQ/TAQ
chrono <- list(
  tpq = sample(1301:1400, 10, replace = TRUE),
  taq = sample(1451:1500, 10, replace = TRUE)
)
set_terminus(Z) <- chrono
get_terminus(Z)
#>        tpq  taq
#> row1  1380 1470
#> row2  1367 1492
#> row3  1391 1454
#> row4  1321 1453
#> row5  1387 1495
#> row6  1346 1476
#> row7  1343 1493
#> row8  1383 1476
#> row9  1400 1462
#> row10 1361 1490

## Collection of features
as_features(Z)
#>       V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 samples group dates  tpq  taq
#> row1  10  1  0  2  4       a     A    NA 1380 1470
#> row2   6  3  4  5 10       a     A    NA 1367 1492
#> row3   3  8 10  2  8       b     A    NA 1391 1454
#> row4   8  6  9  8  2       b     A    NA 1321 1453
#> row5   3  3  3  4 10       c     A    NA 1387 1495
#> row6   2  9  6  5 10       c     B    NA 1346 1476
#> row7   8 10  8  7  3       d     B    NA 1343 1493
#> row8   6  2  7  0  4       d     B    NA 1383 1476
#> row9   0  4 10 10  3       e     B    NA 1400 1462
#> row10  1  2  5  6  0       e     B    NA 1361 1490

## Summarize data
summary(Z)
#> <AbundanceSummary: 10 x 5>
#> A ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#> * Observations: 5
#> * Variables: 5
#> * Replicated measurements: TRUE
#> * Chronology: 1321 - 1495 (year CE)
#> B ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#> * Observations: 5
#> * Variables: 5
#> * Replicated measurements: TRUE
#> * Chronology: 1343 - 1493 (year CE)
#> --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Contents

arkhe is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 1.6.1.9001.
